description: Python SDK for ESR v0.1 — decorators/registries for handlers, adapters, commands; the pattern EDSL (node/port/compose/compile_to_yaml); frozen Action/Event/Directive dataclasses; esr:// URI parser; workspaces.yaml helpers.

key_symbols.name: __version__
key_symbols.description: Package version string '0.1.0'.

key_symbols.name: __all__
key_symbols.description: Public API names re-exported from submodules (PRD 02 F19).

key_symbols.name: Emit
key_symbols.description: Frozen dataclass; directive to an adapter. args wrapped in MappingProxyType (deep-frozen).

key_symbols.name: Route
key_symbols.description: Frozen dataclass; route a message to another actor in the same esrd.

key_symbols.name: InvokeCommand
key_symbols.description: Frozen dataclass; instantiate a registered command sub-topology; params frozen via MappingProxyType.

key_symbols.name: Action
key_symbols.description: Union alias Emit | Route | InvokeCommand — all shapes a handler may return.

key_symbols.name: AdapterEntry
key_symbols.description: Frozen registry entry: name, cls, allowed_io dict.

key_symbols.name: ADAPTER_REGISTRY
key_symbols.description: Global dict[str, AdapterEntry] — keyed by adapter name.

key_symbols.name: adapter
key_symbols.description: Decorator @adapter(name=..., allowed_io=...); asserts static factory exists; rejects duplicate names.

key_symbols.name: AdapterConfig
key_symbols.description: Read-only attribute wrapper over a config dict (PRD 02 F08); __slots__ + __getattr__/__setattr__.

key_symbols.name: AdapterNotFound
key_symbols.description: LookupError subclass raised when adapter name is unresolvable.

key_symbols.name: load_adapter_factory
key_symbols.description: Import esr_<name> package (hyphens → underscores) and return the class's unwrapped factory callable.

key_symbols.name: CommandEntry
key_symbols.description: Frozen registry entry: name + fn.

key_symbols.name: COMMAND_REGISTRY
key_symbols.description: Global dict[str, CommandEntry].

key_symbols.name: command
key_symbols.description: @command(name) decorator (PRD 02 F09); rejects duplicates.

key_symbols.name: _Node
key_symbols.description: Frozen topology node; supports `a >> b` via __rshift__ recording edges into current _CommandCtx.

key_symbols.name: _CommandCtx
key_symbols.description: Mutable accumulator (nodes, edges, ports_in, ports_out) used inside _command_context.

key_symbols.name: _command_context
key_symbols.description: ContextVar-based context manager — pushes a fresh _CommandCtx.

key_symbols.name: node
key_symbols.description: EDSL primitive declaring a node; validates init_directive shape; wraps params/init_directive in MappingProxyType.

key_symbols.name: port
key_symbols.description: Namespace with static .input(name, type) / .output(name, type).

key_symbols.name: compose
key_symbols.description: Namespace with static .serial(a, b) combining two pattern fns, matching shared ports by name+type.

key_symbols.name: Topology
key_symbols.description: Frozen dataclass returned by compile_topology (nodes/edges/ports_in/ports_out/params); custom __hash__.

key_symbols.name: compile_topology
key_symbols.description: Compile a registered command: cycle check + dead-node elimination + param lint + freeze into Topology.

key_symbols.name: _eliminate_dead_nodes
key_symbols.description: Drop orphan nodes (PRD 06 F05) when any edge/depends_on exists.

key_symbols.name: _check_cycles
key_symbols.description: Kahn's algorithm cycle detection over depends_on.

key_symbols.name: _extract_params
key_symbols.description: Scan node string fields + params + init_directive.args for {{template}} names.

key_symbols.name: compile_to_yaml
key_symbols.description: Deterministic YAML dump of Topology (PRD 02 F14).

key_symbols.name: Event
key_symbols.description: Frozen inbound event (source, event_type, args); includes from_envelope classmethod.

key_symbols.name: Directive
key_symbols.description: Frozen outbound directive to an adapter (adapter, action, args).

key_symbols.name: HandlerEntry
key_symbols.description: Frozen registry entry; actor_type, name, fn.

key_symbols.name: StateEntry
key_symbols.description: Frozen registry entry; actor_type, schema_version, model.

key_symbols.name: HANDLER_REGISTRY
key_symbols.description: Global dict keyed by 'actor_type.name'.

key_symbols.name: STATE_REGISTRY
key_symbols.description: Global dict keyed by actor_type (one state model per actor_type).

key_symbols.name: handler
key_symbols.description: @handler(actor_type=, name=) decorator — keyword-only, dup-rejecting.

key_symbols.name: handler_state
key_symbols.description: @handler_state decorator; requires frozen pydantic BaseModel (model_config['frozen']=True).

key_symbols.name: _is_frozen_model
key_symbols.description: Detect pydantic frozen config.

key_symbols.name: _VALID_TYPES
key_symbols.description: frozenset({'adapter','actor','command'}).

key_symbols.name: EsrURI
key_symbols.description: Frozen dataclass with custom __eq__/__hash__ over (org,host,port,type,id,params).

key_symbols.name: parse
key_symbols.description: Strict parser; rejects empty host, unknown type, ids with slashes (matches Elixir Esr.Uri).

key_symbols.name: build
key_symbols.description: Canonical URI builder producing esr://[org@]host[:port]/<type>/<id>[?params].

key_symbols.name: SCHEMA_VERSION
key_symbols.description: workspaces.yaml schema version — 1.

key_symbols.name: Workspace
key_symbols.description: Frozen dataclass for a named workspace (cwd, start_cmd, role, chats, env).

key_symbols.name: read_workspaces
key_symbols.description: Parse workspaces.yaml into {name: Workspace}; returns {} if missing.

key_symbols.name: write_workspace
key_symbols.description: Append a new workspace; rejects duplicates; creates parent dirs.

key_symbols.name: remove_workspace
key_symbols.description: Delete a workspace by name; returns True/False.

key_symbols.name: EsrdHandle
key_symbols.description: Placeholder esrd-process wrapper; run_cli raises until Phase 8c wires a real subprocess.

key_symbols.name: esrd_fixture
key_symbols.description: Pytest fixture yielding an EsrdHandle().

interfaces.name: @handler(actor_type, name) / @handler_state(actor_type, schema_version)
interfaces.description: Register pure handler function and its frozen pydantic state model into HANDLER_REGISTRY / STATE_REGISTRY (PRD 02 F04/F05/F06).

interfaces.name: @adapter(name, allowed_io) + AdapterConfig
interfaces.description: Register an adapter class (must have staticmethod factory) into ADAPTER_REGISTRY; AdapterConfig wraps config dict with read-only attribute access.

interfaces.name: @command / node / port / compose / compile_topology / compile_to_yaml
interfaces.description: Pattern EDSL and compile pipeline: `>>` edges, port.input/output, compose.serial, cycle/dead-node/param-lint checks, deterministic YAML emit (PRD 02 F09-F14, PRD 06 F05-F11).

interfaces.name: Emit / Route / InvokeCommand (Action union)
interfaces.description: The three handler-return action shapes, all frozen with MappingProxyType payloads (§4.4, PRD 02 F02).

interfaces.name: Event / Directive (+ Event.from_envelope)
interfaces.description: Frozen inbound/outbound message dataclasses; Event.from_envelope deserialises an IPC envelope (PRD 02 F03).

interfaces.name: EsrURI parse/build
interfaces.description: Strict esr://[org@]host[:port]/<type>/<id>[?k=v] parser + builder matching the Elixir Esr.URI (PRD 02 F15).

interfaces.name: load_adapter_factory(name)
interfaces.description: Imports esr_<name> to trigger registration and returns the class's unwrapped factory callable (Phase 8a/8b).

dependencies: pydantic (BaseModel for handler_state, frozen model enforcement)
PyYAML (yaml.safe_load / yaml.safe_dump for command YAML + workspaces.yaml)
stdlib: dataclasses, types.MappingProxyType, contextvars, contextlib, importlib, urllib.parse, pathlib, re, tomllib (tests), typing

test_results.command: cd /home/yaosh/projects/esr/py && uv run pytest tests/test_actions.py tests/test_adapter.py tests/test_adapter_layout.py tests/test_command.py tests/test_command_compose.py tests/test_command_yaml.py tests/test_events.py tests/test_handler.py tests/test_handler_layout.py tests/test_optimizer_cse.py tests/test_optimizer_dead_node.py tests/test_package.py tests/test_pattern_compile_yaml.py tests/test_pattern_cycle_rejected.py tests/test_pattern_feishu_app_session.py tests/test_pattern_feishu_thread_session.py tests/test_pattern_param_lint.py tests/test_public_api.py tests/test_uri.py tests/test_workspaces.py -q

user_flows.name: Author a handler + state
steps: Define a frozen pydantic BaseModel (model_config={'frozen': True}) and decorate with @esr.handler_state(actor_type=..., schema_version=1).
Write a pure function `(state, event) -> (new_state, [Action])` and decorate with @esr.handler(actor_type=..., name=...).
Return Emit/Route/InvokeCommand actions; their args/params are auto-frozen via MappingProxyType.

user_flows.name: Register an adapter package
steps: Create esr_<name>/__init__.py that exposes a class with @adapter(name=..., allowed_io={...}).
Class must define @staticmethod factory(actor_id, config: AdapterConfig).
Runtime calls load_adapter_factory(name) which imports the package and returns the unwrapped factory.

user_flows.name: Compose a pattern and emit deterministic YAML
steps: Inside the function call port.input/output and node(...) and use `a >> b` to wire edges; optionally compose.serial(pattern_a, pattern_b).
Call compile_topology(name) to cycle-check, eliminate dead nodes, lint templates, and freeze into a Topology.
Call compile_to_yaml(topo, path) to produce schema_version:1 YAML with deterministic key order.

user_flows.name: Parse / build esr:// URIs across the Python/Elixir boundary
steps: esr.uri.build(type, id, host=..., port=..., org=..., params=...) → canonical string.
Matches Elixir Esr.URI strictness (rejects empty host, unknown type, slashes in id).

user_flows.name: Manage workspaces.yaml
steps: write_workspace(path, Workspace(...)) appends; duplicate name raises.
remove_workspace(path, name) deletes and returns True/False.

notes: Purity rules are documented in esr/adapter.py: the @adapter decorator only performs a shape check (staticmethod factory present) — pure-factory I/O enforcement is deferred to esr.verify.capability.scan_adapter driven by the CI `esr-lint adapters/` hook (reviewer S2). All public dataclasses (Emit/Route/InvokeCommand/Event/Directive/_Node/Topology/EsrURI/Workspace/CommandEntry/HandlerEntry/StateEntry/AdapterEntry) are frozen; dict payloads are wrapped in types.MappingProxyType so they are read-only and hashable. EDSL uses contextvars (_CURRENT ContextVar) so `node()`/`>>`/`port`/`compose` work only inside `_command_context` or `compile_topology`; calling them outside raises RuntimeError. Optimizer rules: dead-node elimination only triggers when any edge or depends_on exists (PRD 06 F05); CSE in compose dedupes nodes by id (PRD 06 F06); Kahn's algorithm rejects depends_on cycles (PRD 06 F07); param lint rejects {{templates}} that are not declared port.inputs — but only when port.inputs exist (PRD 06 F11). EDSL operator: `_Node.__rshift__` implements `a >> b` by appending an edge tuple to the current context; returns `other` so chains like `a >> b >> c` work. URI parser intentionally rejects ids containing slashes to match the Elixir Esr.URI implementation (reviewer S5).
